# products

One row per product.

## Primary Key

`product_id`

## Required Columns

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `product_id` | str (non-empty, stripped) | Unique product identifier |

## Optional Columns

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `product_name` | str \| None | Product display name |
| `category` | str \| None | Product category |
| `vessel_type` | str \| None | Ceramic vessel type (e.g., cup/bowl/plate) |
| `series` | str \| None | Product series |
| `color_family` | str \| None | Color family |
| `pattern_style` | str \| None | Pattern / decorative style |
| `price_band` | str \| None | Price band label |
| `launch_date` | date \| None | Product launch date |
| `status` | str \| None | Product status (active/discontinued/etc.) |
| `margin_band` | str \| None | Margin band |
| `inventory_strategy` | str \| None | Inventory strategy |
| `product_page_url` | str \| None | Product page URL |

## Join Keys

- `product_id` is referenced by `skus.product_id` and `calendar_events.affected_product_id_optional`

## Chinese Aliases (from mapping.py FIELD_ALIASES)

| English Column | Chinese Aliases |
|----------------|-----------------|
| `product_id` | 商品id, 商品ID |
| `product_name` | 商品名称, 商品名 |
| `category` | 商品类目, 类目, 分类 |
| `vessel_type` | 器型, 品类 |
| `series` | 系列, 商品系列 |
| `status` | 商品状态, 状态 |

## Sample Row

```json
{"product_id": "P001", "product_name": "example", "category": null, "vessel_type": "cup", "series": null, "color_family": null, "pattern_style": null, "price_band": null, "launch_date": null, "status": null}
```
